title: Ragnar Blackmane
author: aaron-dembski-bowden
description: Ragnar Blackmane of the Space Wolves is one of the Imperium's most celebrated warriors. A fierce fighter with a turbulent past, his legend is told here — from his rise among the Fenrisian tribes to his deeds as one of the Chapter's greatest heroes.

title: Cassius
author: ben-counter
description: Chaplain Cassius of the Ultramarines is ancient, scarred and utterly devoted to the destruction of the Tyranid menace. His hatred of the xenos is legendary — forged in the fires of the First Tyrannic War — and now he leads his warriors into battle against a new swarm.

title: Shrike
author: george-mann
description: Shadow Captain Shrike of the Raven Guard is a ghost on the battlefield — unseen until the killing blow falls. His legend is one of shadow warfare, lightning strikes and the cold precision of a warrior who has mastered the arts of stealth and sudden death.

title: Azrael
author: gav-thorpe
description: Supreme Grand Master Azrael leads the Dark Angels, carrying the weight of the Chapter's darkest secret. His tale is one of duty, sacrifice and the burden of command — a leader who must balance the honour of the Chapter with the unending hunt for the Fallen.

title: Lemartes: Guardian of the Lost
author: david-annandale
description: Lemartes, Guardian of the Lost, is master of the Death Company — those Blood Angels who have fully succumbed to the Black Rage. He fights alongside his lost brothers, himself hovering on the edge of madness, channelling their berserk fury into a weapon against the enemies of the Imperium.
